generated.clinical_history: Previous CABG, cervical spine fusion, and peripheral vascular disease
generated.technique: Frontal and lateral views with overlying external cardiac monitor leads
generated.findings: Clear lungs. No focal air space opacity or pleural effusion. Mild biapical pleural thickening which is smooth. Atherosclerotic calcifications of the thoracic aorta. Scattered nodular opacities consistent with calcified granulomas.
generated.impression: No acute chest findings. Probable previous granulomatous disease.

ground_truth.findings: 2 images. Moderate thoracic dextroscoliosis, similar to prior imaging. Heart size is normal. No focal airspace consolidation is seen within the lungs. No pleural effusion or pneumothorax.
ground_truth.impression: No acute changes from prior imaging.
